/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/src/GLDebugMessageCallback.cc.o CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/src/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/src/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/src/render.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/src/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/src/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/src/texture.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/Blackhole.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" -o Blackhole -F/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX14.sdk/System/Library/Frameworks  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/glfw/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/glew/lib -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/opt/glm/lib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/opt/glfw/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/glew/lib/libGLEW.2.3.1.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/glm/lib/libglm.dylib -framework OpenGL
